name: unbound-marketplace
description: Unbound AI security and governance plugins for Claude Code

metadata.description: Unbound is an AI security gateway that lets engineering teams use Claude Code without risking data leakage or policy violations. It enforces real-time DLP, jailbreak detection, and command policies — and streams session analytics to the Unbound dashboard for organisation-wide visibility.

plugins.name: unbound
plugins.description: Security, governance, and analytics for Claude Code — powered by Unbound AI.
